items.title: High-resolution support (1920px+) via GPU instances
items.notes: CEO directive: not MVP or Beta. Production-stage track. Requires Cloud Run L4 GPU instances (~$0.002/image, 3-8s). L4 GA in europe-west1, asia-southeast1. us-central1 invitation-only.

items.title: 2x upscale option (in addition to 4x)
items.notes: CEO approved adding 2x option. Faster processing, lower cost. The realesr-general-x4v3 model supports outscale parameter 2 or 4. App already accepts scale query param.
